spec.description: Observability dashboard for the Tuist Kura cache mesh.

spec.expr: up{job="kura", cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance", pod=~"kura-(${tenant})-.*"}

spec.description: 1 = up, 0 = down per selected instance.
spec.title: Scrape Status

spec.expr: sum((rate(kura_http_requests_total_total{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance", route!~"/_internal/.*|/up|/ready|/status/rollout|/metrics|/_unmatched"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"}))

spec.description: Total HTTP requests per second across selected instances.
spec.title: Request Rate

spec.expr: sum((rate(kura_http_requests_total_total{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance", route!~"/_internal/.*|/up|/ready|/status/rollout|/metrics|/_unmatched", status=~"5.."}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"}))

spec.description: HTTP 5xx responses per second.
spec.title: Error Rate (5xx)

spec.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) ((rate(kura_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"})))

spec.description: 95th-percentile request duration across selected instances.
spec.title: p95 HTTP Latency

spec.expr: sum by (pod) ((rate(kura_http_requests_total_total{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance", route!~"/_internal/.*|/up|/ready|/status/rollout|/metrics|/_unmatched"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"}))

spec.description: Per-instance request throughput over time.
spec.title: HTTP Request Rate by Instance

spec.expr: topk(10, sum by (route) ((rate(kura_http_requests_total_total{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance", route!~"/_internal/.*|/up|/ready|/status/rollout|/metrics|/_unmatched", route=~"$route"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"})))

spec.description: Top 10 routes by request rate.
spec.title: HTTP Request Rate by Route

spec.expr: sum by (status) ((rate(kura_http_requests_total_total{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance", route!~"/_internal/.*|/up|/ready|/status/rollout|/metrics|/_unmatched", status=~"$status"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"}))

spec.description: Request rate grouped by HTTP status code.
spec.title: HTTP Status Rate

spec.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) ((rate(kura_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"})))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) ((rate(kura_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"})))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le) ((rate(kura_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"})))

spec.description: Request duration percentiles aggregated across selected instances.
spec.title: HTTP Latency p50 / p95 / p99

spec.expr: sum by (result) ((rate(kura_artifact_reads_total_total{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"}))

spec.description: Artifact read operations per second by result label.
spec.title: Artifact Reads by Result

spec.expr: sum by (result) ((rate(kura_artifact_writes_total_total{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"})) or on() label_replace(vector(0), "result", "no_writes", "__name__", ".*")

spec.description: Artifact write operations per second by result label.
spec.title: Artifact Writes by Result

spec.expr: sum by (producer) ((rate(kura_artifact_reads_total_total{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"}))

spec.description: Read rate broken down by producer.
spec.title: Artifact Reads by Producer

spec.expr: sum by (producer) ((rate(kura_artifact_writes_total_total{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"})) or on() label_replace(vector(0), "producer", "no_writes", "__name__", ".*")

spec.description: Write rate broken down by producer.
spec.title: Artifact Writes by Producer

spec.expr: sum by (outcome, pod) ((rate(kura_replication_apply_results_total_total{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"}))

spec.description: Receiver and bootstrap apply operations per second grouped by outcome and instance.
spec.title: Replication Applies by Outcome

spec.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) ((rate(kura_replication_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"}))) or on() vector(0)

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) ((rate(kura_replication_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"}))) or on() vector(0)

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le) ((rate(kura_replication_request_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"}))) or on() vector(0)

spec.description: Outbound outbox replication request round-trip latency percentiles.
spec.title: Outbound Replication Latency p50 / p95 / p99

spec.expr: sum by (pod, route, status) ((rate(kura_http_requests_total_total{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance", route=~"/_internal/.*"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"}))

spec.description: Traffic to internal peer replication routes grouped by instance, route, and status.
spec.title: Internal / Peer Route Traffic

spec.expr: kura_rocksdb_block_cache_usage_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"} and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"})

kura_rocksdb_block_cache_pinned_usage_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"} and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"})

kura_rocksdb_block_cache_capacity_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"} and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"})

spec.description: RocksDB block cache usage, pinned usage, and total capacity per instance.
spec.title: RocksDB Block Cache Usage

spec.expr: kura_rocksdb_write_buffer_usage_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"} and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"})

kura_rocksdb_write_buffer_capacity_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"} and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"})

spec.description: RocksDB write buffer usage versus capacity.
spec.title: RocksDB Write Buffer Usage

spec.expr: sort_desc(max by (pod) ((kura_rocksdb_block_cache_usage_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"} / kura_rocksdb_block_cache_capacity_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"}) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"})))

spec.description: Block cache fill ratio. Values approaching 1.0 mean the cache is full.
spec.title: Block Cache Utilization

spec.expr: sort_desc(max by (pod) ((kura_rocksdb_write_buffer_usage_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"} / kura_rocksdb_write_buffer_capacity_bytes{cluster=~"$cluster", instance=~"$instance"}) and on (cluster, instance) max by (cluster, instance) (kura_node_info{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant", instance=~"$instance", region=~"$region"})))

spec.description: Write buffer fill ratio. High values signal write pressure.
spec.title: Write Buffer Utilization

spec.expr: sum by (pod) (rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace="kura", container="kura", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"kura-(${tenant})-.*"}[$__rate_interval]))

spec.description: CPU cores consumed per kura pod. No CPU limits are set, so absolute cores are shown.
spec.title: CPU Usage

spec.expr: sum by (pod) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace="kura", container="kura", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"kura-(${tenant})-.*"}) / sum by (pod) (kube_pod_container_resource_limits{namespace="kura", container="kura", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"kura-(${tenant})-.*", resource="memory"})

spec.description: Memory working set as % of configured limit per kura pod.
spec.title: Memory Usage

spec.expr: sum by (pod) (rate(container_fs_reads_bytes_total{namespace="kura", container="kura", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"kura-(${tenant})-.*"}[$__rate_interval]) + rate(container_fs_writes_bytes_total{namespace="kura", container="kura", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"kura-(${tenant})-.*"}[$__rate_interval]))

spec.description: Total disk reads + writes bytes per second per kura pod.
spec.title: Disk I/O

spec.expr: sum by (pod) (rate(container_network_receive_bytes_total{namespace="kura", pod=~"kura-(${tenant})-.*", cluster=~"$cluster"}[$__rate_interval]))
sum by (pod) (rate(container_network_transmit_bytes_total{namespace="kura", pod=~"kura-(${tenant})-.*", cluster=~"$cluster"}[$__rate_interval]))

spec.description: Network bytes received and transmitted per selected instance, excluding loopback.
spec.title: Network Throughput

spec.expr: sum by (pod) (kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total{namespace="kura", container="kura", cluster=~"$cluster", pod=~"kura-(${tenant})-.*"})

spec.description: Cumulative container restarts per kura pod - spikes indicate crashes or OOM kills.
spec.title: Container Restarts

spec.expr: {cluster=~"$cluster", namespace="kura", container="kura", pod=~"$pod"} |~ "\"kura\\.tenant_id\":\"($tenant)\"" | json

spec.description: Structured Kura runtime logs from selected Kura containers.
spec.title: Kura Logs

spec.description: Recent Kura cache endpoint traces from mesh nodes. Internal health checks and scrape traffic are intentionally excluded.
spec.title: Cache Endpoint Traces

spec.expr:
sum by (region) (
  sum by (pod) (rate(kura_http_requests_total_total{cluster=~"$cluster", tenant_id=~"$tenant"}[5m]))
  * on (pod) group_left(region) max by (pod, region) (kura_node_geo_info)
) or sum by (region) (max by (pod, region) (kura_node_geo_info) * 0)

spec.expression:
SELECT __value__ AS Value, region,
  CASE region
    WHEN 'us-east'    THEN 37.926868
    WHEN 'us-west'    THEN 45.523064
    WHEN 'eu-central' THEN 50.110922
    ELSE 0
  END AS lat,
  CASE region
    WHEN 'us-east'    THEN -77.054743
    WHEN 'us-west'    THEN -122.676483
    WHEN 'eu-central' THEN 8.682127
    ELSE 0
  END AS lon
FROM D LIMIT 10

spec.expr: max by (region) (kura_node_geo_info)

spec.expression:
SELECT region,
  CASE region
    WHEN 'us-east'    THEN 37.926868
    WHEN 'us-west'    THEN 45.523064
    WHEN 'eu-central' THEN 50.110922
    ELSE 0
  END AS lat,
  CASE region
    WHEN 'us-east'    THEN -77.054743
    WHEN 'us-west'    THEN -122.676483
    WHEN 'eu-central' THEN 8.682127
    ELSE 0
  END AS lon
FROM F LIMIT 10

spec.description: Server locations (blue squares) and request traffic volume (amber bubbles sized by req/s) on the same map. Fly.io-style: infrastructure markers sit on top of load bubbles.
spec.title: Server Regions & Request Traffic

spec.expr: (sum by (instance) (rate(node_network_receive_bytes_total{instance=~".*kura.*", device=~"e(n|th).*"}[$__rate_interval])) + sum by (instance) (rate(node_network_transmit_bytes_total{instance=~".*kura.*", device=~"e(n|th).*"}[$__rate_interval]))) * 8

spec.description: Total host NIC throughput per kura node. Compare the Scaleway PN node against the Hetzner kura nodes here. Needs node_network_* in hostMetrics (k8s-monitoring).
spec.title: Kura node throughput (rx+tx)

spec.expr: sum by (device) (rate(node_network_receive_bytes_total{instance=~".*kura-fleet.*", device=~"e(n|th).*"}[$__rate_interval]) + rate(node_network_transmit_bytes_total{instance=~".*kura-fleet.*", device=~"e(n|th).*"}[$__rate_interval])) * 8

spec.description: Scaleway kura runner-cache node throughput split by NIC: ens6 is the Private Network (the runner hot path), ens2 the public IP. The PRO2-S PN allocation is 1.5 Gbps.
spec.title: Scaleway kura node by interface  (ens6 = PN · PRO2-S PN ceiling 1.5 Gbps)

spec.expr: kubelet_volume_stats_used_bytes{namespace="kura", cluster=~"$cluster", persistentvolumeclaim=~"data-kura-(${tenant})-(${region})-.*"} / kubelet_volume_stats_capacity_bytes{namespace="kura", cluster=~"$cluster", persistentvolumeclaim=~"data-kura-(${tenant})-(${region})-.*"}
kubelet_volume_stats_used_bytes{namespace="kura", cluster=~"$cluster", persistentvolumeclaim=~"data-kura-(${tenant})-(${region})-.*"}

spec.description: PVC disk fill ratio per kura data volume. Uses kubelet_volume_stats since container_fs_usage_bytes is not collected.
spec.title: Disk Space Usage

spec.expr:
(
  sum by (instance) (rate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode!="idle", cluster=~"$cluster"}[$__rate_interval]))
  / on(instance)
  count by (instance) (node_cpu_seconds_total{mode="idle", cluster=~"$cluster"})
  * 100
)
* on(instance) group_left()
label_replace(
  group by (node) (kube_pod_info{namespace="kura", pod=~"kura-(${tenant})-(${region})-.*", cluster=~"$cluster"}),
  "instance", "$1", "node", "(.*)"
)

spec.description: CPU utilisation % per worker node (left axis). Flat dashed lines on the right axis show total allocatable cores per node.
spec.title: Worker Node CPU Usage
Tuist Kura
